strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure with 15+ years in software
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq, with builder fluency in MCP and cloud tooling
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries, demonstrating initiative and technical depth
concerns: No explicit evidence of Master’s/PhD in AI or formal AI research background despite preferred qualifications
Limited documentation of AI product ownership or large-scale AI platform deployment beyond tooling contributions
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting customer-facing strategic advisory in Germany/EU
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with deep full-stack, cloud, and AI-agent tooling contributions, plus demonstrable leadership via open-source platforms and technical workshops. His work on MCP and agentic workflows directly aligns with AI strategy needs. However, the absence of an advanced AI degree and unclear ownership of shipped AI products are notable gaps, though mitigated by hands-on builder experience.
